properties.query: SELECT c.id, c.course_code, c.professor_id, c.title, c.description, c.semester FROM courses c JOIN enrollments e ON c.id = e.course_id WHERE e.user_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments WHERE user_id = ? AND course_id = ?
INSERT INTO courses (course_code, professor_id, title, description, semester) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT id, course_code, professor_id, title, description, semester FROM courses WHERE professor_id = ?
INSERT INTO sessions (course_id, title, start_at, end_at, week) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT id, course_id, title, start_at, end_at, week FROM sessions WHERE course_id = ? ORDER BY week
UPDATE sessions SET title = ? WHERE course_id = ? AND week = ?
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.is_heart_public FROM users u JOIN enrollments e ON u.id = e.user_id WHERE e.course_id = ? AND u.user_type = 'STUDENT' ORDER BY u.name ASC
SELECT COUNT(pt.tag_id) AS total_hearts FROM peer_reviews pr JOIN peer_review_tags pt ON pr.id = pt.review_id WHERE pr.reviewee_id = ?

SELECT ht.tag_name, COUNT(pt.tag_id) AS tag_count FROM peer_reviews pr JOIN peer_review_tags pt ON pr.id = pt.review_id JOIN heart_tags ht ON pt.tag_id = ht.id WHERE pr.reviewee_id = ? GROUP BY ht.id, ht.tag_name ORDER BY tag_count DESC LIMIT 3
